fileSummary: This GitHub Actions workflow orchestrates the 'Jules Sovereign Lifecycle' for the RPGlitch project, automating tasks like CI checks, AI agent dispatch (Jules bot for reactive and swarm operations), and scheduled hygiene/compliance checks.

functionSummaries.physics-gate: Ensures core project integrity by running npm install and a build preparation script on every push to main/develop or pull request.
functionSummaries.jules-reactive: Dispatches a single Jules AI agent to analyze context and take appropriate action based on specific labels or mentions in issues, PRs, or comments.
functionSummaries.jules-swarm: Orchestrates parallel Jules AI agent dispatches via the jules-sdk when explicitly requested through a label or mention, enabling complex, multi-agent operations.
functionSummaries.strategic-ops: Handles scheduled nightly hygiene operations and manual workflow dispatches, including running compliance checks via Jules and committing changes automatically.

languageNotes: The file extensively uses GitHub Actions YAML syntax, including event triggers, conditional job execution (`if`), environment variables, secrets, and reusable actions. It demonstrates advanced workflow orchestration patterns like concurrency control and dependency management between jobs (`needs`).
